case_title: JOSE LUIS RIOS HERNANDEZ VS. EXCELL CLEANING & BUILDING SERVICES, INC., A

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, JOSE LUIS RIOS AS TO DEFENDANT EXCELL CLEANING & BUILDING SERVICES, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, JOSE LUIS RIOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EXCELL CLEANING & BUILDING SERVICES, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION $5,575.16 PRINCIPAL, $59.59 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,814.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
